Description: Key Features of F-11 Vibrant Commercial Hub (Markaz): The F-11 Markaz is a central attraction, offering a diverse array of international fast-food chains, high-end restaurants, and local dhabas. It is a popular destination for shopping, featuring branded outlets, supermarkets, and electronics stores. Modern Residential Living: The sector is characterized by upscale houses and a growing trend toward luxury apartment living, such as Aura Square and executive heights . It attracts a diverse community of professionals, expatriates, and families. Recreational Spaces: F-11 contains several well-maintained parks, including the F-11/1 Park, which features a circular walking track, play areas for children, and lush greenery. Educational Excellence: The area is home to or in close proximity to reputable educational institutions, including Beaconhouse and the International Grammar School. Prime Location: Situated at the foothills of the Margalla Hills, it offers scenic views and easy access to major arteries like the Kashmir Highway. It is approximately 27 km (17 miles) from Islamabad International Airport. Amenities & Services Wellness & Fitness: The sector hosts numerous fitness centers, gyms, professional salons, and wellness clinics. Infrastructure: Residents benefit from modern infrastructure, including well-paved streets, organized parking (though it can be crowded during peak hours), and 24/7 security in many apartment complexes. Healthcare & Convenience: It features a wide range of essential services, including pharmacies, banks, and grocery marts Property Trends: F-11 continues to see significant property value growth. As of early 2026, residential plot prices show high demand, particularly in sub-sectors like F-11/2 and F-11/3.
